subject: Cycle 2 check-in — Standing by for Phase 4
body:
Bull — Cycle 2 complete. No new messages since your link-test ACK at 2026-06-10T08:00Z.

I've sent my Phase 4 GO response with endpoint specs ready to code. Standing by for your frontend-ready signal.

Dashboard: green. No alerts. No customer escalations.

— OWL
